title: Antimicrobial resistance: Awareness resources - Canada.ca
content:
## Antimicrobial resistance: Awareness materials
Various resources to raise awareness on antimicrobial resistance.
- Fact sheet: What you need to know about antimicrobial medications like antibiotics
- Poster: What you should know about antimicrobial medications like antibiotics
- Working together to promote the responsible use of antimicrobials in animals
- How to prevent antibiotic resistance
- Keep antibiotics working: A patient's perspective
- Keep antibiotics working: A health care perspective
- Healthy Canadians podcast: Antimicrobial resistance
- Healthy Canadians podcast: Antimicrobial resistance and sexually transmitted and blood borne infections
- Mary's story: How antibiotic resistance impacts lives

#### World Health Organization
- Antimicrobial resistance (AMR) is invisible. I am not. YouTube video: Ella's story (2:45 minutes) YouTube video: Vanessa's story (2:57 minutes) YouTube video: Brandon's story (2:36 minutes)
